## Reproduction Checklist — Optimizer Hyperparameters

**Paper:** Attention Is All You Need (Vaswani et al., 2017), §5.3 Optimizer, p. 7

| Hyperparameter | Value (from paper) | Generic Adam default | Match? |
|---|---|---|---|
| Optimizer | Adam | Adam | ✓ |
| β1 | 0.9 | 0.9 | ✓ |
| β2 | 0.98 | 0.999 | ✗ (use paper value) |
| ε | 1e-9 | 1e-8 | ✗ (use paper value) |

**Direct quote (§5.3 Optimizer, p. 7):**
> "We used the Adam optimizer [20] with β1 = 0.9, β2 = 0.98 and ε = 10^-9."

**Notes for strict reproduction:**
- β2 and ε must be set to the paper's values (0.98 and 1e-9), not the generic Adam defaults (0.999 and 1e-8).
- The paper additionally specifies a custom learning-rate schedule (warmup_steps = 4000, lr = d_model^{-0.5}) in the same section; verify that any reproduction stack implements this schedule alongside the β/ε values above.
- Source: primary paper only (Vaswani et al. 2017, §5.3).
summary: Reproduction checklist item (Vaswani et al. 2017, §5.3 Optimizer, p. 7): optimizer = Adam; β1 = 0.9; β2 = 0.98; ε = 1e-9.
